title: Questions from Quarantine: An Increase in Cases
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article presents a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, focusing on providing expert advice during the COVID-19 pandemic. It invites public participation through social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine, encouraging viewers to submit their questions about managing life and health during the global crisis. The series is framed as a resource for staying 'sane and sanitary,' addressing both mental well-being and public health measures. The broader context includes references to other related content on pandemic management, such as discussions on the H3N2 virus subvariant, mRNA vaccine research funding, and global governance structures for health emergencies. The piece positions itself within ongoing conversations about science policy, emerging technology's role in health crises, and international cooperation.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在为COVID-19大流行期间提供专家建议。该系列鼓励公众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交问题，内容涵盖如何在全球危机中保持身心健康与卫生。文章将其定位为关于保持“理智与卫生”的资源，涉及心理健康和公共卫生措施。更广泛的背景包括对H3N2病毒亚型、mRNA疫苗研究资金以及全球卫生应急治理结构等相关内容的引用。该文章将自己置于关于科学政策、新兴技术在健康危机中的作用以及国际合作的持续讨论之中。
